content.problemStatement:
There are two sequences A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč and B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \dots, B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äč. Answer QQQ queries on these sequences.

In each query, you should calculate the dot product of subsequences Ax,Ax+1,‚Ä¶,Ax+l‚ąí1A_x, A_{x+1}, \dots, A_{x+l-1}Ax‚Äč,Ax+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,Ax+l‚ąí1‚Äč and By,By+1,‚Ä¶,By+l‚ąí1B_y, B_{y+1}, \dots, B_{y+l-1}By‚Äč,By+1‚Äč,‚Ä¶,By+l‚ąí1‚Äč, i.e. the value of the expression
‚ąĎk=0l‚ąí1Ax+kBy+k‚ÄČ.\sum_{k=0}^{l-1} A_{x+k} B_{y+k} \,.‚ąĎk=0l‚ąí1‚ÄčAx+k‚ÄčBy+k‚Äč.
constraints: 1‚Č§Ai,Bi‚Č§1041 \le A_i, B_i \le 10^41‚Č§Ai‚Äč,Bi‚Äč‚Č§104 for each valid iii
the sum of NNN for all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
the sum of QQQ for all test cases does not exceed 10510^5105
content.inputFormat:
The first line of the input contains a single integer TTT denoting the number of test cases. The description of TTT test cases follows.
The first line of each test case contains two space-separated integers NNN and QQQ.
The second line contains NNN space-separated integers A1,A2,‚Ä¶,ANA_1, A_2, \dots, A_NA1‚Äč,A2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,AN‚Äč.
The third line contains NNN space-separated integers B1,B2,‚Ä¶,BNB_1, B_2, \dots, B_NB1‚Äč,B2‚Äč,‚Ä¶,BN‚Äč.
Each of the following QQQ lines contains three space-separated integers xxx, yyy and lll describing one query.
content.outputFormat: For each query, print a single line containing one integer ‚ÄĒ the answer to the query (the dot product).
